untranslatable_reason: Dragonfly Doji pattern requires precise T-shape morphology detection (close near high, long lower wick, minimal upper wick, small body). While lower_wick and upper_wick relationships approximate the shape, true pattern recognition requires candlestick geometry analysis not available in the allowed indicator set. Additionally, 'AUTHOR_SILENT' exit conditions and missing quantitative parameters (success rates, average moves, failure rates, volume trends, throwback percentages) cannot be translated without explicit thresholds.
translation_notes: Approximated dragonfly doji shape using bar properties: close near open (small body), lower_wick much larger than body, upper_wick minimal. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal. Exit conditions default to reversal logic due to AUTHOR_SILENT specification. All performance metrics marked AUTHOR_SILENT cannot be quantified. Sample size of 20,000 patterns noted but not actionable without specific threshold values.
